## Summary

<!-- 1–3 bullets describing *what* changed and *why*. -->

## Linked issue / discussion

<!-- Closes #123 / Refs #456 — or "none". -->

## Type of change

<!-- Mark the box(es) that apply. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` / `refactor` — no user-visible change
- [ ] `ci` / `build` — workflows or build pipeline
- [ ] `breaking` — bumps the major version

## Test plan

<!-- Checklist of what you did to verify this works. CI is necessary but rarely sufficient. -->

- [ ] `dotnet build -c Release` succeeds
- [ ] `dotnet test  -c Release --no-build` succeeds
- [ ] Manual smoke test on Windows 11 (describe what you clicked through)
- [ ] Updated docs / CHANGELOG entry under `[Unreleased]`

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes. Drag & drop here. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits are signed (`git config commit.gpgsign true`).
- [ ] I followed the style in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I did not introduce new dependencies without listing them in the PR description.
- [ ] If this is a security-sensitive change, I marked the PR accordingly.
